title: QSMP 2: Reimagined
description: This is a modpack created by me to recreate the experience of YouTuber Quackity's Minecraft series, called QSMP! this is a NOT official modpack
body:
![QSMP logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a74654ae92cd2fd829aed9e8360c1047bbbb7fa1.png)

A fan-made Minecraft modpack inspired by the QSMP 2 series. With more than 150+ carefully selected

## Disclaimer QSMP 2 Reimagined is a fan-made Minecraft modpack inspired by the QSMP 2 series. This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or associated with QSMP, Quackity, or any official QSMP organization.
--- # 🌐 About QSMP 2 Reimagined is a fan-made Minecraft modpack inspired by the QSMP 2 series, designed to recreate its atmosphere, creativity, and sense of adventure. Designed for solo play or with friends, this pack features world generation, decorations, and new technologies all optimized into a single cohesive experience. ![Clouds 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1609020b5aa00744bdcdf75af2da4e46d31b48b0_0.webp) # Features 💫 ### 🌍 Expanded World Generation - New biomes and landscapes - Improved world exploration - Additional structures and dungeons - Enhanced archaeology content ### ⚙️ Technology & Automation - Create and its addons - Build custom aircraft and flying machines - Transportation and mechanical contraptions ### 🏹 Adventure & Survival - Improved progression - Better equipment and tools - Backpacks and travel utilities - New exploration opportunities ### 🏠 Building & Decoration - Hundreds of decorative blocks - Furniture and building additions - Expanded building possibilities ### 🎤 Multiplayer Experience - Simple Voice Chat support - Essential compatibility - Community focused gameplay ### 🚀 Performance Improvements - Multiple optimization mods - Better memory usage - Improved frame rates and loading times ![clouds 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1609020b5aa00744bdcdf75af2da4e46d31b48b0_0.webp) # 📋 Recommended Settings - Allocate between **6 GB and 10 GB of RAM** - Use **Simple Voice Chat** for communication - Use **Essential** or **e4mc** for multiplayer without a dedicated server # 📢 Community & Links Stay up to date with the latest updates, showcases, and development progress. ### 🎥 YouTube Channel Content regarding the modpack, update videos, and more! https://www.youtube.com/@im_lloyd_32 ### 👥 Discord Server Join the community, report bugs, share suggestions, discuss future updates, and chat with the community! https://discord.gg/vz2TjHnU ![Clouds 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1609020b5aa00744bdcdf75af2da4e46d31b48b0_0.webp) # ⚠️ Compatibility Additional mods may work alongside this modpack, but compatibility is not guaranteed. Some mods may conflict with existing content or affect performance. ## 🐞 Bug Reports & Suggestions This modpack is currently in active development. Please join the Discord server to report bugs, submit suggestions, and get support from the community. When reporting an issue, include: - Modpack version - Minecraft version - Crash log (if available) - Steps to reproduce the issue - Screenshots (optional) Community feedback helps improve the project and shape future updates. ![Clouds 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1609020b5aa00744bdcdf75af2da4e46d31b48b0_0.webp) # 🔨 Current Status ⚠️ **Alpha Version** This modpack is currently in the Alpha stage. You may encounter bugs, crashes, unfinished features, or balancing issues while playing. For the best experience, always download the latest version, as each update includes bug fixes, improvements, and new content. Thank you for helping test and improve the project!
